content.en:
When the news of the Terran hunting the great gods of the ghost clan spread, many of the great gods of the ghost clan panicked.

Originally, they felt that their side had entered so many children of the universe at once, and the human race could not catch up with the time, so they would be at a disadvantage.

But as those children of the universe disappeared and fell one by one, they had to panic.

As soon as possible, the other great gods of the ghost clan were ready to leave the netherworld first, return to the outside world, and report the information.

Entrance and exit to the Netherworld.

Dozens of ghost gods united and prepared to return to the outside world.

But just as they were about to leave, some great gods of the human race appeared at the entrance.

The leader is a son of the Eternal Universe!

Now, the great god level of the human race has also been notified, and at all costs, the great god of the ghost race in the netherworld will be destroyed, and no one will be spared.

Therefore, this Eternal Universe Son is secretly waiting here, if the great gods of the ghost clan come in, they will not show up, but if there are people from the ghost clan who want to leave, they will take action.

"Kill!"

The great gods of the ghost clan knew that if they didn't do anything, they would wait for death, so they rushed over.

It's a pity that these great gods are not even children of the universe, and they quickly died at the hands of these human gods, and no one left.

As time passed, more and more of the great gods of the ghost clan died in the netherworld.

This time, the ghost clan almost dispatched tens of thousands of great gods, including dozens of children of the universe, which is almost half of the children of the universe of the ghost clan.

But now, these children of the universe plus tens of thousands of top gods have fallen and died one after another.

Outside.

The Ten Killings Supreme of the Ghost Clan suddenly had some heart palpitations, and he always felt that something would happen.

"What's going on, why do you feel like this, could it be that something has happened in the Netherworld?"

The Ten Kills Supreme thought.

At this moment, a piece of news came from within the ghost clan.

"What, many of the Universe's Child Soul Cards are broken, and even the Dragon Shadow is dead!"

The Ten Kills Supreme was stunned.

Although the Ten Killing Supreme is not his descendant, he is a descendant of another ordinary Supreme of the Ghost Clan, and his talent is very good, even if he can't become a Supreme in the future, he can become a Heavenly Venerable.

But now, His Highness the Dragon Shadow has fallen in the Netherworld.

"How could the dragon shadow die, he has a variety of life-saving things on his body, and he also has many secret treasures, how could he fall in the Netherworld?"

The Ten Kills Supreme panicked.

Immediately, he tried to calculate.

Although his ability to calculate is not good, he can at least calculate the life and death of those great gods.

But this is an incalculable extrapocalypse.

"Death!"

"Death!"

"Death!"

"Death!"

......

"Most of the children of the universe have fallen, and most of the other great god levels have also fallen! How can this be, so many great god levels, only a few days have been in it, how can they all fall?"

The Ten Killings Supreme realized that something was wrong.

Although these great gods are dead, they can't shake the foundation of the ghost clan, but these great gods are the backbone of the ghost clan, and in the future, there are many strong people who can become cosmic gods, masters, and even celestial beings.

But now, these great gods have fallen, and the ghost clan will be in a fault stage, which is extremely detrimental to the development of the ghost clan, and even affects the development of the ghost clan for many years to come.

"Terran !!"

The Ten Killings Supreme stared angrily at the Absolute Curse Supreme in the distance: "Yuan Ming Supreme, why did the great god level of our clan and the son of the universe fall and die one after another, is it your human race's ghost?"

The Yuan Ming Supreme is only one of the twenty-three supremes of the human race, not one of the twelve supremes, and it is considered to be the more powerful among the ordinary supremes, and it is not as good as the ten killing supremes in terms of strength.

But in the face of the question of the Ten Killing Supreme, Yuan Ming Supreme said lightly: "Ten Killing Supreme, the great god level of your ghost clan is too weak, and he died at the hands of our human race god, can this be blamed on our human race?

"Okay!! it's really your Terran who did it!"

The Ten Kills Supreme was furious.

"Immediately put an end to this Netherworld trial, and let all the great gods of our two clans come out!"

Ten Kills Supreme said.

If it ends now, although the ghost clan has suffered heavy losses, it can still keep some seeds and not wipe out the entire army.

"I'm sorry, it's only been a few days, and it's far from the end, just wait, at least a month!" said Yuan Ming Supreme.

"Yuan Ming Supreme, don't go too far, do you want to completely destroy the great god of our ghost clan?"

The Ten Killing Supreme said angrily.

"Well, I do!"

Yuan Ming Supreme said with a smile.

"You ......"

The Ten Killings Supreme glared angrily.

As time passed, the great gods of the ghost clan continued to fall.

And according to calculations, the great gods of the human race have hardly fallen, this is a one-sided slaughter!

Suddenly.

A cosmic god on the side of the ghost clan came to the front of the Ten Killing Supreme: "Ten Killing Supreme, I am ready to kill myself and enter the Netherworld with the cultivation of the Great God Realm, my parents and several personal disciples are in the Netherworld, they may not be dead yet, I must rescue them, and kill all the Terran gods by the way." Please stop the Supreme of the Human Race for me, and don't let him stop me from entering the Netherworld!"

"Blood Plate, you're crazy, you will permanently drop your cultivation like this, and you won't even be able to enter the Universe God Realm again. Besides, even if you use the secret technique to kill yourself, if you don't deal with it in time, you will fall into a coma. You can't fight long when you enter the Netherworld at this time. "

Ten Kills Supreme Dao.

"Even if you can only fight for one day, that's enough!"

Blood Disk Universe Shinto.

"Good!"

The Ten Killings Supreme agreed.

Immediately, the Blood Disk Universe God began to cast a secret technique, picked up an illusory blood knife and slashed at his own flesh and soul.

In the first slash, the cultivation of the Blood Disk Universe God fell from the Universe God Realm to the galaxy level.

In the second slash, the cultivation of the Blood Disk Universe God fell from the galaxy level to the galaxy level.

After the third slash, the Blood Disk Universe God became a great god.

Distance.

"The ghost clan's secret technique - Three Lives Slash!"

The Yuan Ming Supreme knew the plan of the Blood Disk Universe God.

The other party wants to enter the Netherworld with a great god-level cultivation, in this way, although the cultivation of the Blood Disk Universe God has fallen to the great god level, but the other party's mastery of supernatural powers, peerless learning, secret arts, and law attainments are far away from the great gods.

In this way, the combat power that the Blood Disk Universe God can display is very powerful.

It's just that the consequences of this secret technique are too great, and it won't last long.

But now, the Blood Disk Universe God is almost crazy, so he dares to perform such a devastating secret technique.

Shout!

After the Blood Disk Universe God fell to the Great God Realm, he rushed to the entrance of the Netherworld.

At this time, the Yuan Ming Supreme began to block: "Blood Disk Universe God, even if you cut off your cultivation, you are still not qualified to enter the Netherworld, otherwise you will break the rules!"

Rumble!

The Ten Killing Supremes appeared, and one hand stopped the Yuanming Supreme: "Yuanming Supreme, the blood plate is now a great god-level cultivator, and he is qualified to enter the Netherworld!"

Boom!

The Ten Kills Supreme struck the Yuan Ming Supreme with one palm, and the Blood Disk Universe God instantly entered the Netherworld.

But Yuan Ming Supreme didn't have much to worry about, and seemed to be very unconcerned about this matter.

......

After the Blood Disk Cosmic God entered the Netherworld, his divine sense probed and began to search for the traces of the human god.

"Found it!"

The Blood Disc Universe God smiled hideously.

Not far away.

The faces of a group of Terran gods suddenly changed, and they saw the arrival of the Blood Disk Universe God.

Although the Blood Disk Universe God has slashed his cultivation, he still retains a faint cosmic god majesty on his body.

"It's not good, this is a cosmic god who has cultivated himself!"

The only Eternal Universe Child guessed it out and shouted.

Boom !!'

The Blood Disk Universe God descended, staring at everyone.

"Say, how can you Terrans hunt down our ghost gods, and what is your purpose?"

The Blood Disk Universe God didn't kill these great gods immediately, because killing them would not help.

He entered here this time, not only to rescue his parents and his own disciples, but also to figure out the plans of the human race, so that the price he paid was worth it.

"I don't know!"

The Terran's Ancient-level Son of the Universe said coldly.

The Blood Disk Universe God has made a move, and he is going to kill some first, and then torture them slowly.

"Blood Hand!"

This is the mastery of the Blood Disk Universe God, and it is earth-shattering as soon as it is struck, and it contains the law of blood that is extremely terrifying.

This void seems to be shrouded in this huge bloody hand!

Can't stop, can't escape!

"Comparable to the invincible Eternal Rank His Highness!"

The Terrans' primary-level children of the universe are in despair.

Obviously, this Blood Disk Universe God is also very powerful in the Universe God Realm, otherwise he would not be qualified to follow the Ten Kills Supreme.

In the past, this Blood Disk Universe God was a son of the universe, and now that he has fallen to the Great God Realm since he was slashed, he can naturally exert a strength comparable to that of an invincible Eternal Ancient Highness.

Such strength is enough to sweep all the Terran Sons of the Universe, which is why he is extremely confident.

"The Ghost Clan's Cosmic God Self-Cultivation is indeed a very good means. It's a pity that the Terrans have long calculated all the means of the ghost race, including this one. It's a pity that this secret technique of your ghost clan can only slash the cosmic god into the realm and fall into the great god. No matter what kind of great god of your ghost clan falls into the Netherworld, he will definitely die, because I am here!"

As soon as the words fell, Ye Tian walked out of the void tearing through the space.

Instantly, the space froze, and the momentum of the Blood Disk Universe God was crushed back.

And the blood disc hand was also smashed by Ye Tian with a knife and completely dissipated.

"Tianyue Dao, you are His Highness the Ten Thousand Laws of the Human Race!"

The Blood Disk Universe God recognized Ye Tian.

As one of the most demonic highnesses in the universe, His Highness Wanfa has naturally been studied by the ghost clan.

Therefore, the Blood Disk Universe God was also familiar with Ye Tian's methods, even if Ye Tian changed his appearance, he could identify his identity from his sword skills.

"Yes, it's me!"

Ye Tian changed back to his original appearance, looking directly at the Blood Disk Universe God.

"No wonder the great god of our ghost clan died a lot, it turned out that you entered the realm of the great god and entered the netherworld. Very good, I will kill you today, and let your Terran lose a future Supreme!"

The Blood Disk Universe God burned flesh and blood, and once again stimulated a variety of secret techniques to increase strength.

He knew that Ye Tian was very terrifying, and he could see it from the knife just now.

Therefore, he is now desperate to use the secret technique, even if it falls immediately after the secret technique.

If Ye Tian doesn't die, all the ghost gods in the Netherworld will have to die!

stats.label: Stats — Cap. 605
